Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise (2) Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Frank Fleming, Esq. for Petitioner: Sherna Budhabhatti, present as Guardian at litem for: Taahira Luqman Siddiqui and Aisha Luqman Siddiqui, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
As to Minor: Taahira Luqman Siddiqui, Attorney's Fees $27,207.00, Balance $151,150.00
As to Minor: Aisha Luqman Siddiqui, Attorney's Fees $36,633.00, Balance $186,850.00
Each of the balance to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in the Order.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
